form.formComment: Hit the ground running with a fast early sectional but found one better when runner up over 431m at this track clocking 24.89. Comes through a solid form race. Expected to feature.

formComments.title: TAB

form.formComment: Didn't make the placings last time at The Gardens (23.36) in a Grade 5, finishing a 4.5 lengths fifth. Has performed well off the draw with a win and four places from seven starts. Has ability and can sneak into the finish.

form.formComment: Hit the frame latest (25.39) when third at this track in a Grade 5. Has performed well off the draw with a win and two places from six starts. Can feature with the right run.

form.formComment: Latest effort finished 2nd in a Grade 5 on April 11 over 431m at this track behind My Irish beaten 2.5 lengths (25.38). Has clocked a fast 24.88 Best Time here at the trip. Top chance.

form.formComment: Finished third (24.95) at this track last time making it five placings in a row. Will need a little luck early from the draw. Prefer others.

form.formComment: Is back up to 431m which has been an issue in the past. Last appeared when third over 340m at this track a week ago. More than capable and has to be included.

form.formComment: Turned in another winning performance after leading recording back-to-back wins at this track over 431m (25.19). In hot form and expected to go close again.
